Giant Wood Spider Femur  
 

No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Giant Wood Spider Femur
No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:windaen
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-26 09:31:27
Page Updated:Thu Jan 22nd, 2026

Expansion: Shadows of Luclin
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 5
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Butcherblock Mountains
NPC Name
a large spider - Butcherblock Mountains
a rock spiderling

NPC Name
a giant spider - Commonlands

NPC Name
a carrion spider
a crag spider

NPC Name
a kerra spider

strathbone healer

a giant spider - Lesser Faydark

a giant wood spider

greaterfaydark - a large widow hatchling

NPC Name
a noxious spider

Nektulos Forest
NPC Name
a Deep Forest Spider
a large araneidae
a Large Forest Crawler - Nektulos Forest
a Nektulos widow
an araneidae spiderling

Old Commonlands
NPC Name
a cursed venomfang

Permafrost Keep
NPC Name
giant wooly spider - Permafrost Keep

South Ro
NPC Name
a desert tarantula - South Ro
a terrorantuling

Steamfont Mountains
NPC Name
a giant yellow recluse
a large yellow recluse
a spiderling - Steamfont Mountains

NPC Name
a bonebinder
bonecrawler
bonecrawler hatchling
Burynai-bane spider

a large spider - The Qeynos Aqueduct System
a sludge spiderling

NPC Name
a crab spiderling

Toxxulia Forest
NPC Name
a large widow - Toxxulia Forest
a large wood spider

West Karana
NPC Name
a spiderling - West Karana

Quest Name

Rivervale
Quest Name

Slickfinger Tunic

Recipe list - Premium only.

Nothing so far in Field of Bone
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2024 at 12:39 PM Rating: Good
Ridolain
Scholar
280 posts
Been killing the listed spiders in Field of Bone for past 3-4 hours, and not one femur has dropped. Doing this for a Task.

Has anyone found a femur since the posting a few years ago?

QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2004 at 11:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591813378393
19 posts
No biggie but a few days ago i was in SOL B & Giant Wood Spider Femur & Thorax dropped off Noxious Spider along with regular GSD. Noxxy is my SOL B nemesis so i'm always looking for. Wasn't sure what they were for so i looted to research. Oh well seems Sony working their wisdom again LOL

Looted one after 3 rock spiderling kills in Butcherblock today. If you are doing a quest needing this and having trouble getting it might want to kill around the Plane of Knowledge book in Butcherblock.
